name: Rutabaga Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice the rutabaga and sweet potato; place in a saucepan.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer until tender (about 20-25 minutes).
4. Drain the vegetables, reserving some of the cooking liquid.
5. Place the vegetables in a blender or food processor fitted with the metal blade.
6. Process until smooth, adding reserved water if needed to achieve desired consistency.
7. Add cayenne pepper, nutmeg (if using), and dry milk powder; process again until blended.
8. Warm the puree gently in a saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, if necessary.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
CAL: 55; CHO: 16g; CAR: 12g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 32g; FAT: 0g
